subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the Desired One Whose billowing ocean of knowledge hath encompassed the world, and the hand of Whose bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که امواج عمان علمش عالم را احاطه نموده و ید عطایش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement
